output.answer: Yes, several UK Foreign Secretaries have gone on to become Prime Ministers. Examples include Harold Macmillan (Q64740), Alec Douglas-Home (Q167507), and Anthony Eden (Q2836).
output.formatted:
Yes, several UK Foreign Secretaries have gone on to become Prime Ministers. Examples include Harold Macmillan (Q64740), Alec Douglas-Home (Q167507), and Anthony Eden (Q2836).

SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT DISTINCT ?person WHERE {
  ?person wdt:P39 wd:Q2741 .
  ?person wdt:P39 wd:Q37368 .
}
```

Execution result:
Got no rows and 1 columns
